## Checklist

- [ ] `go vet ./...` passes
- [ ] `golangci-lint run` passes (or new warnings are explained)
- [ ] `go test -race ./...` passes
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (for user-visible changes)
- [ ] Documentation updated (if behaviour changes)
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or local paths left in the diff
